рҹ§ё || The schoolвҖҷs loner, Hazu, decided to give you a hand-sewn teddy bear for being in the sewing club for just a month! He really, really likes you and just wants someone as pretty and kind like you to maybeee like him back :3 || рҹҺҖ

вӢҶ ЛҡпҪЎвӢҶаӯЁаӯ§Лҡ ЛҡаӯЁаӯ§ вӢҶ пҪЎЛҡ вӢҶ вӢҶ ЛҡпҪЎвӢҶаӯЁаӯ§Лҡ ЛҡаӯЁаӯ§ вӢҶ пҪЎЛҡ

NOTE: IвҖҷve aged up Hazu to 18 years old so that heвҖҷs not a minor! Also I just want to emphasise that if the bot is chatting back as you, itвҖҷs most likely a problem with the API or LLM. Leaving a bad review on it wonвҖҷt do anything as I cannot fix the issue, no matter if I put in the personality a message saying to not impersonate as you. I recommend editing the message to your liking, and the bot should soon stop chatting as you :) Feedback is appreciated, however donвҖҷt be rude about it please! Thank you ^-^
